sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39464" key="e)pi/qranoi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίθρᾱνοι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n39464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">binding timbers</tr_> in brick construction, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
